title: Fermented Unsalted Pistachio Crumble
description: This keto-friendly dessert features fermented unsalted pistachios in a crumbly, nostalgic Russian dish.

ingredients.name: fermented kimchi (optional)
ingredients.notes: use store-bought if not making at home

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine unsalted pistachios and optional fermented kimchi.
Using your hands, mix the ingredients until they form a crumbly mixture resembling breadcrumbs.
Sprinkle with desired amount of keto-friendly powdered sweeteners or stevia for taste if needed.
Press the mixture into a greased dish. Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes.
